name: International Federation of Red Cross and Red Crescent Societies
description: World's largest humanitarian network, helping people before, during and after disasters.

name: United Nations Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs
description: Coordinates international humanitarian response to emergencies and disasters.

name: World Health Organization
description: Specialized agency of the United Nations responsible for international public health.

name: Save the Children
description: International NGO that promotes children's rights, provides relief and helps support children in developing countries.

name: ToggleCorp
description: Technology company building data systems for humanitarian and development organizations.
